steps.title: Count favorable outcomes
steps.content: There are $12$ blue marbles out of $30$ total marbles. The favorable outcomes are the blue marbles, and the total outcomes are all marbles in the jar.

steps.title: Write the probability
steps.content: Use the probability formula. $$P(\text{blue})=\frac{\text{favorable outcomes}}{\text{total outcomes}}=\frac{12}{30}$$ The answer is B.
